current.text:
Triangle Agency Artist Rider
TECHNICAL RIDER Beste Hira (DJ set)
• 1 x Allen & Heath Xone 96/92 mixer or Pioneer DJM-V10. If not available DJM900 will suffice
• Recording output available
• 4 x Pioneer CDJ3000, CDJ2000NXS2 or Pioneer CDJ2000 NXS.
• All players are connected to each other by UTP so the link function is available and working
properly.
• 2 x Monitor Speaker at ear height or aimed at the DJ’s ear.
• Monitor speaker volume adjustable on the mixer.
• 4 x Free power plugs
• Logistics contact will let you know in advance if an MC or any instruments are going to be
included during the set.
• Possibility to sound check with provided professional sound engineer.
HOSPITALITY RIDER
Please provide enough drinks in the DJ booth.
4 x bottled water
4 x red bull
1 x bottle of Champagne, Prosecco or rose wine of a good brand
Some fruits like bananas and apples or snacks
The artist requires:
• A dressing room or backstage area
• A minimum of 5 guestlist spots
• 2 extra backstage passes
• A safe and secured or locked space for equipment, bags, and jackets.
